message:
🌱 contour: Address not set on Ingress resource (#1240)

* 🌱 Add contour: Address not set on Ingress resource mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct contour namespace to projectcontour

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "contour: Address not set on Ingress resource",
+    "description": "Address not set on Ingress resource. Requested by 16+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current contour deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your contour version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n projectcontour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nhelm list -n projectcontour 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working contour installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review contour configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant contour configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n projectcontour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nkubectl get configmap -n projectcontour -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=contour\n```\nContour does not set the IP value on the Ingress resource. This value is necessary for services like [ExternalDNS](https://github.com/kubernetes-incubator/external-dns) to work properly."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Address not set on Ingress resource",
+        "description": "I was going to pick this up, my thought here was to do the following:\n\n1. Contour watches for all Services right now, when it finds service with an external LB attached, then look to see if that matches the namespace where Contour is deployed. This will be the IP/DNS name that should get attached\n```yaml\nbut has value:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n projectcontour -l app.kubernetes.io/name=contour\nkubectl get events -n projectcontour --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Address not set on Ingress resource\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I was going to pick this up, my thought here was to do the following:\n\n1. Contour watches for all Services right now, when it finds service with an external LB attached, then look to see if that matches the namespace where Contour is deployed. This will be the IP/DNS name that should get attached to any Ingress object.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "but has value:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
